Mini README Audit

Rubric Results

15 checks run. 2 failed: missing quickstart section, hero text too long. 13 passed. Source: rubric.sh with repo_type=library.

Simulated Reader

Evaluator: friction at install section — missing pip command. Adopter: unclear quickstart. Contributor: no contributing guide linked. Returning user: navigation is clear.

Rollout

Ship per-skill contract tests before flipping the resolver on. Each of the 14 originating skills owns its own shim under scripts/.
